category_sources: source_facts.description says ipinfo is a tool for calculation of IP networks.
source_facts.homepage is the Kyberdigi project page for this IP network calculation tool.
display_name_sources: source_facts.homepage path https://kyberdigi.cz/projects/ipinfo uses the project name ipinfo.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official project page and best available official documentation surface for this small utility.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; no official source-control repository URL is present in source_facts.
source_facts.source-archive provides an official release tarball from kyberdigi.cz, but it is not a source-control repository.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies IP network calculation functionality.
source_facts.executables lists ipmatch, supporting IP address/network matching and calculation tags.
